caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is recorded in a studio setting against a wall of black acoustic foam panels. He wears over-the-ear headphones and a dark shirt over a grey undershirt. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. In the initial moments, the man looks slightly to the side with a neutral, focused expression. As the sequence progresses, his expression shifts into a wide smile, and he eventually closes his eyes while laughing. His head tilts slightly as he reacts, while the background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
